title: Friendly Mob Craftables
description: This mod/data pack allows you to craft friendly mob drops through crafting recipes.
body:
I couldn't find a data pack or mod that had friendly (cows, sheep, etc.) mob drop crafting recipes for 1.19.2. So, I made one.  All recipes can be found in the Gallery section or through JEI/REI. 

---

**TLDR**

This is my first data pack/mod.
Current state: Beta (tested and working!) 
I may or may not update it once finished. Feedback is welcome. Made with MCreator.

---

**Suggestions**
- I always use JEI/REI to find my recipes. This data pack is compatible.
- I recommend using Polymorph for recipe conflicts. 
- Use Peaceful Recipes if you want the complete experience in peaceful mode with added hostile mob drops.

Please don't repost this as your own. Don't repost outside of Modrinth. You can use it in your modpack if the creator credit remains the same.

**THE INFORMATION BELOW DOESN'T APPLY TO THE MOD VERSION**
- **For the datapack version:**
Here is some info on how to install a datapack: https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Tutorials/Installing_a_data_pack

Because this is an individual datapack, you will have to manually install the file and move it to your saved world folder.
- Download the datapack file. 
- Navigate to your Minecraft world directory. 
- Place the datapack file in the "datapacks" folder within your world directory.
